git.commit_message:
feat(ci): add Gate 1 Semantic Integrity checker (v1.1 REPORT-ONLY)

- Implement AST-based Optional-aware semantic checker
- Enforce: Optional contracts, silent exception prohibition, predicate clarity, docstring intent
- Scope: mahoun/core/**, mahoun/domain/**, mahoun/orchestrator/** only
- Exclude: api/**, tests/**, ci/** (Gate 0 already handles API boundaries)
- Mode: REPORT-ONLY (exit 0), future v1.2 can block on ERROR
- Initial scan: 0 errors, 4 warnings (docstring clarity)
- Policy: Gate 1 enforces semantic intent, not perfection

Gate 1 is layered on top of frozen Gate 0 baseline.
No changes to existing codebase or Gate 0 logic.
